completeness.notes: Hand-drafted to back the curated tool layer. Covers AllowanceHolder price/quote and gasless quote/submit/status. Skipped: /swap/chains, /sources, /gasless/price, /gasless/chains, /swap/permit2/price (handwritten client used these but the curated tool layer does not). Response schemas are loose object types because 0x returns rich nested objects that vary per endpoint and per chain.
